title: Codex Review

codex.stdout:
The current changes have functional issues in execution and comparison: failed runs are reported as successful, added test cases are omitted from comparisons, and the required `baseUrl` is ignored during execution. These issues can produce incorrect baselines and misleading compare results.

Full review comments:

- [P1] Do not mark errored runs as completed — D:\16. 자동화 도구\safeAutoTest\app\api\scenarios\[id]\run\route.ts:65-66
  If any step fails, `runScenario()` still resolves normally with `TestCaseResult.status === "error"`, so this handler always calls `markRunCompleted()` and returns `success: true`. In the save-snapshot flow that means a broken execution is treated as a successful AS-IS baseline, which will hide real failures unless the Playwright call itself throws.

- [P2] Report test cases added after the AS-IS snapshot — D:\16. 자동화 도구\safeAutoTest\lib\comparison-engine.ts:77-79
  `compareWithSnapshot()` only iterates over `snapshot.testCaseResults`, so any new test case present only in the current run is silently ignored. When a scenario gains an extra test case, the compare API can still return `identical`, even though the current execution no longer matches the saved baseline.

- [P2] Honor each test case's required baseUrl during execution — D:\16. 자동화 도구\safeAutoTest\lib\test-runner.ts:49-55
  `TestCase.baseUrl` is collected and even required by the JSON importer, but it is never applied before executing the steps here. As a result, a test case whose first action is `click`/`fill` starts on `about:blank`, and a `navigate` step with a relative path has no base URL to resolve against, so the required field has no runtime effect.

rendered:
# Codex Review

Target: working tree diff

The current changes have functional issues in execution and comparison: failed runs are reported as successful, added test cases are omitted from comparisons, and the required `baseUrl` is ignored during execution. These issues can produce incorrect baselines and misleading compare results.

Full review comments:

- [P1] Do not mark errored runs as completed — D:\16. 자동화 도구\safeAutoTest\app\api\scenarios\[id]\run\route.ts:65-66
  If any step fails, `runScenario()` still resolves normally with `TestCaseResult.status === "error"`, so this handler always calls `markRunCompleted()` and returns `success: true`. In the save-snapshot flow that means a broken execution is treated as a successful AS-IS baseline, which will hide real failures unless the Playwright call itself throws.

- [P2] Report test cases added after the AS-IS snapshot — D:\16. 자동화 도구\safeAutoTest\lib\comparison-engine.ts:77-79
  `compareWithSnapshot()` only iterates over `snapshot.testCaseResults`, so any new test case present only in the current run is silently ignored. When a scenario gains an extra test case, the compare API can still return `identical`, even though the current execution no longer matches the saved baseline.

- [P2] Honor each test case's required baseUrl during execution — D:\16. 자동화 도구\safeAutoTest\lib\test-runner.ts:49-55
  `TestCase.baseUrl` is collected and even required by the JSON importer, but it is never applied before executing the steps here. As a result, a test case whose first action is `click`/`fill` starts on `about:blank`, and a `navigate` step with a relative path has no base URL to resolve against, so the required field has no runtime effect.
